name: Belastingzaken skills
description_en: Eight commands and eight skills for Dutch income tax, BTW, VPB, payroll tax, deductions, and objections — no filing, professional review required.

name: FALCON / nl-ai-lawyer
description_en: Advise on Dutch law — employment/CAO, AVG, tax, real estate, and immigration — through 14 skills and 7 specialist agents.

name: nl-eli-mcp
description_en: Retrieve versioned Dutch legislation (BWB) and Rechtspraak rulings, keyless.

name: aangifte-ib-skill
description_en: A skill that prepares a sourced Dutch personal income-tax return with an adaptive interview and review dossier.

name: rechtspraak-mcp
description_en: Search Rechtspraak open data and resolve legal citations through LiDO, across six tools.

name: wetten-overheid-tools
description_en: Search Dutch legislation on wetten.overheid.nl and retrieve its structure, articles, and terms.

name: OpenAccountants Plugin
description_en: Classify transactions and apply Dutch tax guidance — VAT, income tax, payroll, and zzp deductions — sourced to Wet IB 2001; the Dutch package is not yet accountant-signed off.

name: IURA (iura-nl)
description_en: Draft and review Dutch legal documents — contracts, NDAs, juridische notities, and conclusie van antwoord — grounded in Dutch jurisprudence via the IURA MCP.

name: dutch-finance-planner-skill
description_en: Coach personal finances for the Netherlands through a guided interview — box 1/2/3, toeslagen, AOW/pension, mortgage/HRA, the 30% ruling, and gift/inheritance tax.

name: Wetsanalyse AI
description_en: Produce source-traceable analyses of Dutch legislation with the JAS method and formalise them into Belastingdienst RegelSpraak, through a skill plus a bundled wettenbank MCP with human-review checkpoints.

name: nl-tax-agent-skills
description_en: Turn your own tax documents into a source-cited workpack mapped to Mijn Belastingdienst fields for the income-tax return and voorlopige aanslag — you still enter the figures yourself.
